prompts: /plan "fix the scrape of the of search listings, we should converting the string containing the beds and baths into an integer value. 4 + 2 beds is getting converted into '42' beds, when we should see '4 + 2'. Same with the bath. Also the Square Feet is also wrong '3000 - 3500 sqft' should end up being '3500'"
not quite, '4 + 4' bed is being converted as the number 8. It should stay '4 + 4'
update docs and push to git
